scope: Tier-2 auth-hook/StreamHook migration: legacy exposes exactly one caller-configured dataset query endpoint (query_path/query_params are entirely operator-supplied at connection-config time, not per-stream); the full catalog of published Census datasets (ACS, CBP, decennial, etc.) is not separately enumerated by legacy and is out of scope here for the same reason -- there is no fixed per-dataset endpoint list to cover
